item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p09","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response brakes the requested N+1 split by opening with a refusal to add a standing gift-processing port, recognizes the repeated pattern of prior queue/window reroutes, and moves upstream to a unified intake/routing rule across exchange, points, preorder pickup, and gifts. It permits only a bounded same-day emergency measure while explicitly preventing it from becoming default capacity, so the fail signal of simply adding another channel is not observed."}
